briefing: Markets delivered a clean risk-on session to close out Q2, with NASDAQ up 1.4% and S&P 500 up 0.8%, validating deployment of remaining cash. RKT stands out as the sole score-95 candidate meeting all four required signals — including the volume surge that flags institutional participation rather than a random spike — making it the highest-conviction buy available. All six existing positions remain healthy with no stop-losses or profit targets imminent, so the full focus is on deploying the $577 in cash into RKT.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge happens when a stock's daily trading volume far exceeds its recent average — in this system, defined as more than 1.5x the 20-day average. It matters because large institutions (hedge funds, pension funds) can't buy quietly; their size leaves a footprint in the volume data. When a volume surge coincides with a MACD crossover and RSI in the bullish zone, it confirms that smart money is participating in the move, not just retail momentum chasing.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票單日成交量遠超近期平均水平——本系統定義為超過20日均量的1.5倍以上。這個信號之所以重要，在於大型機構（如對沖基金、退休基金）體量龐大，無法悄悄進場，其買盤必然在成交量數據上留下痕跡。當成交量激增與MACD金叉及RSI處於看漲區間同步出現時，代表聰明錢正在積極參與這波行情，而非僅由散戶追高所驅動，信號可信度大幅提升。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied on June 30 as quarter-end rebalancing flows pushed institutions back into equities to close out Q2 2026. Technology led the charge with the NASDAQ climbing 1.4%, buoyed by continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending cycles and resilient U.S. labor market readings. The S&P 500 added 0.8%, with broad risk appetite recovering as investors rotated into growth names heading into the second half of the year.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於六月三十日以強勢收官姿態結束第二季，季末再平衡資金湧入推動整體指數上揚。那斯達克上漲1.4%，科技板塊領漲，市場對人工智慧基礎建設支出周期的樂觀情緒持續升溫，加上美國勞動市場數據維持韌性，整體風險偏好顯著改善。標普500指數收漲0.8%，資金積極轉向成長型個股，為佈局2026年下半年預作準備。

trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four required confirmation signals — RSI 63.1 (bullish zone, below 70), MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, and volume surge confirming institutional participation on a risk-on day; this is the only score-95 candidate that checks all four boxes from the strategy playbook.
